[[File:Torag the Corrupted chathead.png|left]]
'''Torag the Corrupted''' is the second youngest [[Barrows brothers|Barrows brother]]. Torag's crypt is located to the south-west of the [[Barrows]] area. He uses [[melee]] equipment, which makes him vulnerable to [[Magic]] attacks. Torag's set effect is '''Corruption''', which gives him a 25% chance per [[successful hit]] to lower the player's [[energy]] by 20% of the current amount; having 50% energy would result in 10% energy being drained, leaving the player with 40% energy.

Torag is often regarded as the easiest brother since his set effect does not pose a notable threat in combat and he is inaccurate compared to the rest of the brothers. He attacks using hammers, so armour defensive against crush is advised. Despite his inaccuracy, he can still hit up to 23 so the use of [[Protect from Melee]] is advised for players with low [[Defence]]. Protect from Melee does '''not''' prevent his effect from activating.

Torag is commonly defeated with the use of a [[trident of the swamp]]/[[Trident of the seas|seas]], [[Iban Blast]] or [[Magic Dart]]. Players can also use [[Entangle]] or [[Ice spells]] on Torag to attack him from a distance.
